name: autotests
description: E2E tests for Library app — Positive, Negative, Security

scripts.test:auth: npx playwright test tests/positive/auth tests/negative/auth tests/security/auth
scripts.test:books: npx playwright test tests/positive/book tests/negative/book tests/security/book
scripts.report: echo '\n  Open report: file://$(pwd)/report/index.html\n' && xdg-open report/index.html 2>/dev/null || open report/index.html
